userGoal: Remove obsolete config fields, improve generated subagent docs, and refactor generation/config code for maintainability.
successImage: hiddenLanguage is removed from harness config and related source docs where it is only redundant configuration; generated subagent markdown is more specific and operationally useful; generation/config code is easier to extend and test; build, tests, and validate pass
nonGoals: behavior changes unrelated to harness config or generated AI-facing files
